title: malvastrum densiflorum var. viscidum
intro: Malvastrum densiflorum var. viscidum, also known as the sticky malvastrum or sticky Mexican hibiscus, is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malvastrum densiflorum var. viscidum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
